---
title: "GPT Q1"
subtitle: "LX / Tech: Sprache und Technologie - Language and Technology"
#date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: '2026-05-20'
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-expand: true

categories:
   - gpt
   - llms
   - training prospectives
metadata-files:
  - _quarto-common-lxtech.yml
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< meta cmeta >}}
:::

{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}}
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

-----

> [LXTech](lxtech001.qmd) / random chat 001 

-----
:::

```{r,echo=F,eval=T}
print("engine on...")
```

#### snc
- 16215.1.2

# random chat...
Q: @chatgpt_how_2026

{{< include _gpt-16214.md >}} 

# references
